rows.label: qev060201_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Excuse me. I have
something I wish to ask you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0002
rows.name:
I have heard that various
Unions exist within BLADE...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0003
rows.name:
If I need someone to search
for an alien, which Union
should I request help from?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_JNK0010
rows.name: Companion

rows.label: qev060201_SEL0011
rows.name:
State that alien troubles
are a Companion's job.

rows.label: qev060201_JNK0020
rows.name: Pathfinder

rows.label: qev060201_SEL0021
rows.name:
State that you can find them by
expanding the Frontier Net.

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0004
rows.name:
I see, Companions... Indeed, individuals
who have resolved numerous issues with
aliens would be most reliable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Can that system Earthlings install
everywhere be used to search for people
as well? How incredibly convenient...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0006
rows.name:
That's right... Judging by the
way you speak, you are also a
member of BLADE, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0007
rows.name:
Umm... If you wouldn't mind,
could I ask you a favor?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0008
rows.name:
You see... I want you to track down a
trailer that headed into the Primordial
Wilderness to excavate Voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0009
rows.name:
There is a young Zaruboggan
named Hoskeran riding inside.
He is a bit... absentminded.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Since this is his first expedition, I explicitly
told him to report back to me frequently with
details, but I have received absolutely no contact.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0011
rows.name:
There's always the chance of the
worst happening. Could you please
go and check on his well-being?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Thank you. Whether this expedition
succeeds or fails will drastically
alter our Voltant storage capacity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0013
qev060201_MSG0014
rows.name:
Please center your search around the Northmost
Beach in the Primordial Wilderness, where
Hoskeran headed for the excavation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hoskeran is quite rare for a Zaruboggan...
Er... how should I say it... he is a
highly unique individual.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0016
rows.name:
I thought he might be suited for a new project
like this that requires flexibility, which is
why I sent him to the Primordial Wilderness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0017
rows.name:
*Sigh*... I just hope he is safe,
at the very least. Please, I'm
counting on you for the search.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0018
rows.name: Hoskeran! What happened to the trailer!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0019
rows.name:
You had loaded a massive amount of
Voltant onto that, didn't you...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Horonalderon. Earthlings have
a fascinating method of conversation
known as "metaphor".[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Shall I express my current
situation using a "metaphor"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Wha... What are you saying! This is
no time for that kind of talk...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0023
rows.name:
I am terribly sorry for dragging
you into such a mess...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0024
rows.name:
However... please lend us your strength. We
cannot afford to cause trouble for the people
of this city who have so graciously accepted us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0025
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]!! How did it go!? Did you find
any clues about the culprit!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Th-This is!! Is this the Voltant
stolen by the culprit!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0027
rows.name:
Amazing! You managed to persuade
the culprit with your brilliant
negotiation skills and retrieve it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0028
rows.name:
Th... Thank you so much! Hey, Hoskeran!
You express your gratitude too... No,
before that, apologize properly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Umm... An apology is that thing
where you lower your head 45 degrees
and say "I'm sorry", correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060201_SEL0031
rows.name:
Nod in agreement since it's
too much of a hassle.

rows.label: qev060201_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060201_SEL0041
rows.name:
Properly explain the meaning
of an apology to Hoskeran.

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0043
rows.name:
Yes. Then, I'm sorry.
Thank you very much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0030
rows.name:
*Yawn*... I'm getting kind of
sleepy. Metaphorically speaking,
you are like a grand hypnotist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0031
rows.name:
...I'm sorry. It was a mistake
for me to let this person speak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0032
rows.name:
This is a token of my gratitude.
Thank you for saving this
city... and the Zaruboggan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0033
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]!! How did it go!? Did you find
any clues about the culprit!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Eh? Hoskeran, who came here to
take a nap, ended up revoltanting
the Voltant that the culprit threw?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0035
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0036
rows.name:
I never understood why Golbogga required an
existence like him until now, but I feel
like I grasped it for just a split second.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0037
rows.name:
When driven into a corner, he possesses an
apathy that overturns absolutely everything...
He truly has that within him, doesn't he...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_JNK0050
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060201_SEL0051
rows.name: Nod and agree that might be the case.

rows.label: qev060201_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060201_SEL0061
rows.name: Strongly deny that possibility.

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0038
rows.name:
I see... Perhaps I need to learn a
thing or two from him myself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0039
rows.name:
R-Right! That's true. Oh no... I
was almost dragged into Hoskeran's
world there for a moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0040
rows.name:
I am truly glad that a rational person
like you was present here with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0041
rows.name:
...Regardless, thank you very much. I am
incredibly relieved that we managed to avoid
causing any trouble for the residents of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060201_MSG0042
rows.name:
This is a token of my gratitude.
Thank you for saving this
city... and the Zaruboggan![ST:wait ]
